title: Converting SQL Server code to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates using Gemini to convert SQL Server T-SQL code to PostgreSQL, translating data types and explaining the conversion process. Developers can use Gemini as an AI tutor through Google Cloud's Database Migration Service to learn PostgreSQL while migrating applications to the cloud.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through using Gemini to convert SQL Server T-SQL code into PostgreSQL, covering data type translation and explanations of each conversion step. The demonstration is positioned within Google Cloud's Database Migration Service, where Gemini acts as an AI tutor for developers moving applications to the cloud. The takeaway: the conversion process pairs code generation with teaching, so developers learn PostgreSQL while migrating rather than treating the output as a black box.
